title: API Contract Testing
description: Catch breaking API changes before they ship — consumer-driven contracts (Pact) and spec-first validation (OpenAPI/Schemathesis/Dredd/oasdiff), across REST, GraphQL, and event/message boundaries. Enforces guardrails that reject exact-value matching in favour of type/shape matchers, require every pact and spec to carry a version + git sha, replace shared fixtures with per-interaction provider states, and treat any backward-incompatible change as a versioned breaking change. Wires provider verification, breaking-change diffs, and blocking can-i-deploy / record-deployment gates into CI so an incompatible release is stopped, not merely reported.
